identity.anonymousId: localStorage key: nexus_vid — persistent UUID, set before any auth
identity.userId: set after login/signup — triggers IdentityMap merge + EventLog backfill
identity.accountId: resolved from User.accountId — B2B company or userId for B2C

MARKETING.description: B2B website — acquisition and conversion tracking

events.name: Page_Viewed
events.trigger: User navigates to any page (fired globally on route change)

events.name: Hero_CTA_Clicked
events.trigger: User clicks the main CTA button in the hero section

events.name: Navbar_CTA_Clicked
events.trigger: User clicks the Get Started button in the navbar

events.name: Pricing_Section_Viewed
events.trigger: Pricing section scrolls into view (IntersectionObserver)

events.name: Lead_Form_Submitted
events.trigger: User submits a contact or demo request form

events.name: Chat_Widget_Opened
events.trigger: User opens the live chat widget

events.name: Signup_Page_Viewed
events.trigger: User lands on the signup page

events.name: Demo_Requested
events.trigger: User submits a demo request

PRODUCT.description: Dashboard — product usage and activation tracking

events.name: User_Signed_Up
events.trigger: User completes registration (also triggers Identity Resolution)

events.name: User_Logged_In
events.trigger: User authenticates (also triggers Identity Resolution)

events.name: Dashboard_Viewed
events.trigger: User opens their dashboard

events.name: Chat_Session_Started
events.trigger: User initiates a new chat session

events.name: Chat_Message_Sent
events.trigger: User sends a message in chat

events.name: AI_Rating_Submitted
events.trigger: User rates an AI response

events.name: Payment_Initiated
events.trigger: User starts the checkout flow

events.name: Payment_Completed
events.trigger: Stripe confirms payment success (server-side webhook)

events.name: Payment_Failed
events.trigger: Payment attempt fails

events.name: Payment_Refunded
events.trigger: Stripe charge.refunded webhook

events.name: Feature_Used
events.trigger: User activates a named product feature

WALLET.description: B2C customer dashboard — personal data view (Row-Level isolated by userId)
WALLET.isolation: Application-layer: all queries require userId = req.user.sub. Future: PostgreSQL RLS.

events.name: Wallet_Dashboard_Viewed
events.trigger: Customer opens their wallet view

events.name: Transaction_Viewed
events.trigger: Customer clicks on a specific transaction

events.name: Wallet_Benefit_Claimed
events.trigger: Customer redeems a benefit or reward

events.name: Statement_Downloaded
events.trigger: Customer downloads their statement

events.name: Report_Exported
events.trigger: Customer exports a custom report

context.description: Auto-enriched by useAnalytics hook on every event

device.os: Windows | macOS | Linux | Android | iOS | Other

bi_layer.refresh: Hourly REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY via cron job
bi_layer.migration_path: PostgreSQL → pg_logical CDC → ClickHouse when EventLog exceeds ~5M rows
